title: Edge-Free Glass
description: Edge-Free Glass is a resource pack that removes the frames from the edges of glass blocks. This creates seamless, unified glass surfaces, allowing you to build modern and aesthetic structures.
body:
Edge-Free Glass is a simple yet useful resource pack designed to give your Minecraft world a sleeker and more modern look.

This pack completely removes the border frames on glass blocks in Minecraft. Whether you use glass on its own or place blocks side-by-side in a wall, your glass will now have a smooth and seamless appearance without those distracting border lines.

This transforms glass from being just a window into a transparent surface that completes your architectural vision. Your builds will gain a more minimalist and sophisticated look. If you appreciate my work, the best way you can support me is by leaving a positive comment and sharing this pack with your friends.

Installation is very simple. Just place the downloaded .zip file into your resourcepacks folder, which you can access from the Minecraft main menu by going to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder. Once you enable the pack, you will see the changes instantly.

I hope Edge-Free Glass makes your Minecraft world more aesthetic and eye-catching!
